## Question

What do we need to find out?

## Why this matters

How could this affect Atlas, TSC, Academy, Culture Garage, school, automotive, family, business, sponsors, or property?

## Sources to check

- [ ] Official source
- [ ] Recent source
- [ ] Local/source-specific contact if needed
- [ ] Competing options

## Decision needed

After research, should this be:

- [ ] Ignored
- [ ] Watched
- [ ] Researched deeper
- [ ] Prototyped
- [ ] Integrated
- [ ] Made a strategic priority

## Output required

- [ ] Short summary
- [ ] Links/sources
- [ ] Risks
- [ ] Smallest next experiment
- [ ] Recommended GitHub issue or roadmap update

## Safety / privacy check

- [ ] No private family data
- [ ] No confidential documents
- [ ] No sensitive personal details
- [ ] No external commitments without approval

## Notes
